title: Design Websites with AI
subtitle: Go from idea to polished website using AI design tools and no-code builders

modules.title: AI-Assisted Design Thinking
lessons: How AI is changing web design
Generating website layouts with ChatGPT prompts
Using AI image generators for hero visuals
Choosing colour palettes with AI assistance
Building a design brief in 10 minutes with AI
modules.mini_task: Generate a website concept brief using ChatGPT for your chosen niche

modules.title: Wireframing and Structure
lessons: What wireframes are and why they matter
Using AI to generate wireframe ideas
Turning prompts into Figma or Canva layouts
Responsive design principles for mobile
Planning navigation and information hierarchy
modules.mini_task: Create a 3-section wireframe in Figma or Canva using AI suggestions

modules.title: Building with AI Website Builders
lessons: Overview: Framer, Webflow, Wix, and Squarespace AI
Using Framer AI to generate a landing page from a prompt
Editing AI-generated sections to match your brand
Adding animations and hover effects without code
Optimising for mobile view
modules.mini_task: Generate a landing page in Framer AI and edit the hero section

modules.title: Content and Copy with AI
lessons: Writing high-converting headlines with AI
Generating service descriptions and CTAs
SEO-friendly meta descriptions from AI
Creating FAQ sections automatically
Repurposing existing content into web copy
modules.mini_task: Generate homepage copy for 3 sections using AI and paste into your builder

modules.title: Launch-Ready Polish
lessons: Checking site speed and performance
Adding a custom domain
Testing on different screen sizes
Connecting a simple contact form
Sharing and getting feedback on your site
modules.mini_task: Publish your website and run a Lighthouse or PageSpeed check

final_project: Design, build, and publish a complete website for a real or fictional brand using AI tools at every stage — from concept to copy to launch.
